Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a temporal profile for a supply chain process with activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to provide pairs of activities that eventually follow each other not just direct I should include a representative subset ensuring complexity by considering pairs separated by multiple steps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The values should be estimated average times in seconds presumably based on the example using 86400 for 1 day 3600 for 1 hour and standard deviations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Process flow is roughly SS to OP to RC to QI to CA to PT to PK to WS to DT to AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Direct pairs SS OP maybe 2 hours OP RC maybe 5 days RC QI maybe 4 hours QI CA maybe 8 hours CA PT maybe 3 hours PT PK maybe 2 hours PK WS maybe 30 minutes WS DT maybe 2 days DT AS maybe 7 days

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for non direct pairs separated by multiple steps SS RC SS QI SS CA SS DT OP QI OP CA OP WS RC CA RC PT RC PK RC DT QI PT QI WS CA WS CA DT PT WS PK DT WS AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The temporal profile considers pairs that eventually follow each other in at least one trace so PT and WS appear in order PT then PK then WS and the time distance should include intermediate activities times

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need a representative subset not all possible pairs there are 45 pairs for 10 activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use direct base values then derive others approximately as sums of intermediate averages with reasonable larger standard deviations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is a good representative subset covering direct and various jumps

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait lets recalculate SS to WS and correct earlier estimates by summing SS OP OP RC RC QI QI CA CA PT PT PK PK WS

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually I need to be somewhat consistent and average should be roughly additive so I adjust SS RC SS QI SS CA SS WS SS DT SS AS

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Lets also correct OP related ones OP QI OP CA OP PT OP PK OP WS OP DT OP AS

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: RC related separated QI related separated CA related separated PT related separated PK related separated WS related separated are recomputed to keep the profile internally consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Pick a representative subset that demonstrates complexity with separated pairs and include direct and long range pairs

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The values are internally consistent additive averages and standard deviations scaled somewhat
